response.justification: The candidate is an experienced, versatile software developer with strong web, full-stack, and some systems-level background, but the profile does not match this role's core requirements. Professional C++ experience is limited to a ~7-month stint at National Instruments in 2014–2015; the bulk of their career is TypeScript/Node.js web development with some DLang systems work. There is no evidence of message-broker architectures at industrial scale, MQTT/IoT protocols, IEC 62443 or SDL secure-development practices, or industrial automation domain experience, all of which are central to this position.
strengths: Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (async I/O, fibers, caching) at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing tools, mentoring and workshop experience
Broad multi-domain background spanning web, mobile, desktop, embedded, and GIS platforms
concerns: Minimal recent C++/STL experience; primary languages are TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang
No industrial cybersecurity, IEC 62443, SDL, or OT/automation protocol exposure (MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA)
No demonstrated experience with message brokers, IoT platforms, or industrial automation products
